nasb.text: and whoever picks up any of their carcasses shall wash his clothes and be unclean until evening.

esv.text: and whoever carries any part of their carcass shall wash his clothes and be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: 拾起牠們的屍體的，就要洗淨自己的衣服，並且不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 任何人拿它们的尸体，都必须洗净所穿的衣服，要等到傍晚才能洁净。
